auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to submit coins and manage your submissions.
auth.registerSubtitle: Register to join the CoinArchive contributor program.
auth.verificationSent: Verification email sent. Please check your inbox.
auth.serverUnreachable: Unable to reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.verifyEmail: Please verify your email before logging in.
errors.pendingApproval: Your account is verified and awaiting admin approval.
errors.rejected: Your contributor account has been rejected. Contact an administrator if you believe this is a mistake.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.signInFailed: Unable to sign in. Please try again.
errors.resendRateLimited: Please wait before requesting another verification email.
errors.resendFailed: Could not resend verification email. Please try again.
errors.registerRateLimited: Too many registration attempts. Please try again later.
errors.emailExists: If this email is already registered, please log in or reset your password.

dashboard.subtitle: Track your coin submissions, drafts, and review progress.
dashboard.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
dashboard.loadFailed: Unable to reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
dashboard.noSubmissionsBody: Start your first catalogue entry to see activity here.

core-identity.label: Core Identity
core-identity.description: Required details used to identify and classify the coin.
core-identity.tip: Use the official catalogue title and accurate country, year, denomination, and coin type.

images.label: Images
images.description: Obverse, reverse, and optional gallery photographs.
images.tip: Existing images remain unchanged unless you replace or remove them. JPG, PNG, or WEBP up to 5MB each.

mint-information.label: Mint Information
mint-information.description: Single mint mark or multi-mint variant details.
mint-information.tip: Enable mint variants when the same issue was struck at multiple mints with distinct marks.

specifications.label: Specifications
specifications.tip: Include weight, diameter, and quality when known — these enrich catalogue search and comparison.

descriptions.label: Descriptions
descriptions.description: Optional detailed notes for catalogue and collector context.
descriptions.tip: Describe devices, historical context, and collector notes that help reviewers validate the entry.

status-admin.label: Status & Admin
status-admin.description: Catalogue visibility and record status settings.
status-admin.tip: Published catalogue and featured flags control public visibility after approval.

review-submission.label: Review Submission
review-submission.description: Confirm images, details, and recommended fields before submitting.
review-submission.tip: Check for duplicates and missing catalogue details — you can still go back to edit.

validation.taxonomyOptionsFailed: Options could not be loaded. Please refresh and try again.
validation.taxonomyInvalidOption: Please select a valid existing option.
validation.imageType: File must be JPG, PNG, or WEBP.

specifications.twoEuroHint: Standard values for 2-Euro coins. Can be adjusted as needed.
specifications.overwriteDescription: Some specification fields already contain values. Replace them with the 2-Euro standard values?

duplicate.exact: This coin already exists in CoinArchive and cannot be submitted again.
duplicate.similar: Similar coins were found. Please review before submitting.
duplicate.unavailableDetail: You can still submit. WordPress will run the final check.
duplicate.draftInfo: You already have an unfinished draft that may be the same coin.

admin.queueSubtitle: Review, filter, and open submissions faster.
admin.noResults: No submissions match this review filter.
